nasb.text: Then he said, “Take the arrows,” and he took them. And he said to the king of Israel, “Strike the ground,” and he struck it three times and stopped.

esv.text: And he said, “Take the arrows,” and he took them. And he said to the king of Israel, “Strike the ground with them.” And he struck three times and stopped.

cnv.text: 他又說：“拿箭來！”他就拿了來。他對以色列王說：“你擊打地吧！”他就擊打地，打了三次就站起來了。

ccb.text: 以利沙说：“拿几枝箭来。”王便取来箭。以利沙说：“用箭击打地！”王击打了三下就停下来。
